Contact & Sign Up

Register your athlete for Lansing Area Track Club or get in touch with questions about our programs.

Athlete Registration

This static Astro form is ready to connect to your preferred provider. Replace the action URL with CloudCannon Forms, Formspree, Netlify Forms, or another endpoint.

Get in Touch

Have questions? Send us a message and we will get back to you soon.

Interested in Volunteering?

We are always looking for volunteer coaches, meet helpers, and community supporters.

Lansing Area

Track Club

Helping youth athletes in Lansing, Michigan build speed, endurance, confidence, and discipline through track, running, and community since 2015.

Serving Lansing, East Lansing, Okemos, Holt, Waverly, Delta Township and surrounding Mid-Michigan communities.
